channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump voter regret mostly limited to swing voters who backed him in 2024
item.description: 84% of 2024 Trump voters said they would vote for him again if given the chance.

item.title: DOJ accuses Yale of bias against Asian and white students in admissions
item.description: A DOJ letter stated that Yale's use of race gave Black applicants up to 29 times higher odds of an interview.

item.title: RFK ally confirms FDA firing: 'I learned so much and leave with no regrets'
item.description: Dr. Tracy Beth Hoeg will be replaced as FDA acting drug center director by Dr. Mike Davis.

item.title: Tarot readers using AI split into two camps, with major implications for the technology
item.description: AI can offer direct guidance or serve as a tool for critical thinking.
